'''ây-y-k-j''' ('''kayaykejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calcinate|calcinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calcinate|calcinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-y-k-j
|-
! Lemma
| kayaykejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyaykejoko|thiyaykejoko]] || [[word:jiyaykejoko|jiyaykejoko]] || [[word:shiyaykejoko|shiyaykejoko]] || [[word:kiyaykejoko|kiyaykejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyaykejoko|thuthuyaykejoko]] || [[word:jujuyaykejoko|jujuyaykejoko]] || [[word:shushuyaykejoko|shushuyaykejoko]] || [[word:kukuyaykejoko|kukuyaykejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyaykejoko|thuyaykejoko]] || [[word:juyaykejoko|juyaykejoko]] || [[word:shuyaykejoko|shuyaykejoko]] || [[word:kuyaykejoko|kuyaykejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyaykejoko|thoyaykejoko]] || [[word:joyaykejoko|joyaykejoko]] || [[word:shoyaykejoko|shoyaykejoko]] || [[word:koyaykejoko|koyaykejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
